title: Pricing versions
excerpt:
Old versions of pricing does not new packages. 
So if a client, purcashed few years ago purchased a small packge, and now there is XL package which was not in the old versions, the new packge is not avilable.

posts.author: guy.gavish (Guygav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Old versions of pricing does not new packages.
So if a client, purcashed few years ago purchased a small packge, and now there is XL package which was not in the old versions, the new packge is not avilable.
